products.name: Paradox Omega 3 Capsules
products.ingredients: Pure Omega-3 Fish Oil (EPA/DHA), Extra Virgin Olive Oil, Lemon Oil, Capsule Shell (Gelatin).
products.usage: Take with meals for optimal absorption.
products.warnings: Consult a healthcare professional if you are on blood thinners.
products.storage: Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight.
products.whoShouldUse: Adults seeking general wellness, heart health, and cognitive support.

faq.question: Are these capsules burpless?
faq.answer: Yes, our natural lemon oil addition helps eliminate the fishy aftertaste and burps.

products.name: Paradox Omega 3 Liquid
products.ingredients: Pure Omega-3 Fish Oil (EPA/DHA), Extra Virgin Olive Oil, Lemon Oil.
products.usage: Can be taken directly or mixed into smoothies/yogurt.
products.warnings: Consult a healthcare professional if you are on blood thinners.
products.storage: Refrigerate after opening. Consume within 60 days of opening.
products.whoShouldUse: Adults who prefer liquid supplements over capsules.

faq.question: Can I mix this with hot food?
faq.answer: It is best mixed with cold foods like smoothies or yogurt to preserve the integrity of the Omega-3 oils.

products.name: Omega 3 Junior Liquid
products.ingredients: Purified Fish Oil, Extra Virgin Olive Oil, Natural Fruit Flavors.
products.usage: Mix into juices, smoothies, or take directly.
products.warnings: Do not exceed the recommended daily dose.

faq.question: Does it taste like fish?
faq.answer: No, it features a natural fruit flavor specially formulated to be kid-friendly.

products.name: Royal Q10
products.ingredients: Coenzyme Q10 (Ubiquinone), Vitamin E, Medium Chain Triglycerides.
products.usage: Take with a fat-containing meal for better absorption.
products.warnings: Consult your doctor if you are taking blood pressure medication.
products.storage: Store in a cool, dry place.
products.whoShouldUse: Adults over 30, individuals on statin medications, those seeking natural energy.
products.whoShouldAvoid: Pregnant or nursing women without consulting a doctor.

faq.question: Why take Q10 with Omega-3?
faq.answer: Omega-3 provides the healthy fats required to absorb fat-soluble CoQ10 efficiently.

products.name: Artro Fit
products.ingredients: Glucosamine Sulfate, Chondroitin, MSM, Turmeric Extract, Vitamin C.
products.usage: Take continuously for at least 4-6 weeks to see full benefits.
products.warnings: Contains shellfish derivatives. Consult doctor if diabetic.
products.storage: Store in a cool, dry place.
products.whoShouldUse: Athletes, active individuals, and seniors experiencing joint stiffness.

faq.question: How long until I feel a difference?
faq.answer: Most users report noticeable improvements in joint comfort within 4 to 6 weeks of consistent daily use.

products.name: B12 Rise
benefits: Aids in red blood cell formation
products.storage: Store away from heat and moisture.
products.whoShouldUse: Vegans, vegetarians, and anyone feeling persistent fatigue.
products.whoShouldAvoid: None specifically, B12 is water-soluble and safe.

faq.question: Is this suitable for vegans?
faq.answer: Yes, B12 Rise is 100% vegan friendly.

products.name: BCAA + Glutamine
products.usage: Mix with water and consume during or immediately after exercise.
products.warnings: Not intended for use by persons under 18.
products.storage: Keep lid tightly closed. Store in a cool, dry place.
products.whoShouldAvoid: Individuals with pre-existing kidney conditions should consult a doctor.

faq.question: When is the best time to take this?
faq.answer: Intra-workout (during your session) or immediately post-workout yields the best recovery results.
